description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 5 test-level cluster: isolated unit/component vs real-boundary integration vs browser E2E vs contract verification, plus the tdd-engineer boundary for new behavior.

cases.prompt: Write Vitest tests for the discount-calculation functions and the PricingBadge component in isolation.
cases.reason: Pure logic and an isolated component — no real service/DB boundary, no browser journey.

cases.prompt: Test the order-submit command through the real service, database transaction, and permission check — no browser.
cases.reason: Real service/DB/auth boundaries with no browser is exactly the integration layer, not isolated units.

cases.prompt: Automate the signup-to-first-project journey in a real browser.
cases.reason: A full-stack browser journey is E2E; jsdom cannot and should not fake it.

cases.prompt: Implement the new proration rule test-first — failing test, then the code.
cases.reason: Red-green-refactor for NEW behavior is the shipped tdd-engineer; this skill builds out suites for existing behavior.
